verified.name: HelloSalut
verified.tagline: Say hello in any language, returned as JSON
verified.description: Give it a language code and it hands back the local word for "hello." A tiny, single-purpose endpoint from fourtonfish that is handy for greeting users in their own tongue.
verified.notes: Also accepts ?ip= to detect language from an IP. Response Content-Type is application/json.

verified.name: IBGE
verified.tagline: Brazil's official geography and statistics service
verified.description: The Brazilian Institute of Geography and Statistics exposes its localities, regions and datasets over a clean REST API. This sample lists all Brazilian states with their region grouping; other paths cover municipalities, census and economic data.
verified.notes: Government open-data service; response is a JSON array of 27 states.

verified.name: IP Address Details
verified.tagline: Geolocate any IP with no key to start
verified.description: IPinfo maps an IP to city, region, country and coordinates plus the owning network. Keyless requests work for casual lookups; a free token unlocks higher limits and extra fields.
verified.notes: Body carries a 'readme':'https://ipinfo.io/missingauth' hint; a free access token raises quotas.

verified.name: IPGEO
verified.tagline: IP geolocation with ISP, timezone and currency
verified.description: TechnikNews returns geolocation for an IP address including region, ISP, timezone and even the local currency and proxy/hosting flags. No key or signup is needed for the JSON lookup.
verified.notes: Listing advertises unlimited free use; response includes a 'cached' flag.

verified.name: Open Topo Data
verified.tagline: Elevation and ocean depth for a lat/lon
verified.description: Query the elevation (or ocean depth) at one or more coordinates against a choice of open elevation datasets. The public instance is keyless; the test-dataset shown here returns a demo value while named datasets serve real terrain data.
verified.notes: No access-control-allow-origin header observed. Public host has documented daily/second call caps; self-hosting is offered for heavy use.

verified.name: PostalCodes
verified.tagline: Search postal codes and places worldwide
verified.description: A keyless search endpoint that returns matching towns, regions and postal-code sets across many countries as JSON. Useful for autocomplete over global postal data; the site also offers per-country bulk exports.
verified.notes: Public search endpoint returns application/json; no CORS header seen. Ad-supported site.

verified.name: ViaCep
verified.description: Resolve a Brazilian CEP into street, neighbourhood, city, state and region plus IBGE and DDD codes. A long-standing, widely used free endpoint for Brazilian address data.
verified.notes: Also supports reverse address-to-CEP search and XML/piped output formats.

verified.name: Ziptastic
verified.tagline: US ZIP code to city and state in one GET
verified.description: Hand it a US ZIP code and it returns the country, state and city as JSON. A minimal, no-frills lookup with a single path segment.
verified.notes: Body is valid JSON despite a text/html Content-Type header.

verified.name: Bank Negara Malaysia Open Data
verified.tagline: Malaysia's central bank open data feeds
verified.description: The Bank Negara Malaysia open API publishes exchange rates, interest rates, Kijang Emas gold prices and other monetary data. The sample returns the latest gold buying/selling prices per ounce.
verified.notes: Requires header 'Accept: application/vnd.BNM.API.v1+json' (no key). No CORS header observed.

verified.name: Brazil Central Bank Open Data
verified.description: The Banco Central do Brasil serves thousands of economic time series through its SGS API. This sample pulls the latest USD/BRL PTAX reference rate; any series is addressable by its numeric code.
verified.notes: Dates are DD/MM/YYYY; format also available as CSV. Series code (here bcdata.sgs.1) selects the dataset.

verified.name: Brazil Receita WS
verified.tagline: Look up Brazilian companies by CNPJ
verified.description: ReceitaWS resolves a Brazilian company CNPJ into its registration status, legal name, trade name and business activities. The free keyless tier is heavily rate-limited but returns rich company records.
verified.notes: Free tier is tightly throttled (site advertises a few requests per minute); paid plans lift the cap. No CORS header observed.

verified.name: Brazilian Chamber of Deputies Open Data
verified.description: The Câmara dos Deputados publishes deputies, parties, bills, votes and expenses through a versioned REST API in JSON or XML. The sample lists political parties; server responses can be slow.
verified.notes: Send 'Accept: application/json' to get JSON (XML is default in some clients). First uncached call took ~7s; warm ~0.9s.

verified.name: City, Gdańsk
verified.tagline: Gdańsk city open data over CKAN
verified.description: The city of Gdańsk runs a CKAN open-data portal whose action API lists and serves datasets as JSON. The sample returns the full catalogue of dataset slugs covering transport, budget, safety and more.
verified.notes: Standard CKAN action API; use package_show?id=<slug> for a single dataset.

verified.name: City, Helsinki
verified.tagline: Helsinki region open data over CKAN
verified.description: Helsinki Region Infoshare (HRI) exposes its open datasets through a CKAN action API. The sample lists every dataset slug in the catalogue, from a 3D model of the city to statistical tables.
verified.notes: www.hri.fi 302-redirects to hri.fi/data/en/...; the CKAN API lives under /data/<lang>. No CORS header observed.

verified.name: City, New York Open Data
verified.tagline: NYC's open datasets over the Socrata API
verified.description: New York City's open-data portal is a Socrata instance where every dataset has a keyless JSON endpoint. The sample pulls two rows from the 311 service-request dataset; SoQL query parameters let you filter and page.
verified.notes: Socrata (SODA) API; an optional app token raises throttling limits. Each dataset has its own 4x4 resource id.

verified.name: Colorado Information Marketplace
verified.tagline: Colorado state open-data catalog and datasets
verified.description: Colorado's state open-data portal runs on Socrata, so both its dataset catalog and individual datasets are queryable as JSON without a key. The sample hits the catalog discovery endpoint and returns dataset metadata.
verified.notes: Socrata discovery API; the bulk /api/views.json listing timed out, so the paged catalog endpoint is used instead.

verified.name: Data USA
verified.tagline: US public data as tidy JSON records
verified.description: Data USA visualizes public US datasets and exposes them through its Tesseract data API. Pick a cube, drilldowns and measures and it returns aggregated records; the sample pulls US population by year from an ACS cube.
verified.notes: The old /api/data path now 404s; current API is the Tesseract endpoint at api.datausa.io. Underlying data sources include the US Census.

verified.name: EPA
verified.description: The US Environmental Protection Agency's Envirofacts service serves environmental records by building a REST path of table, column filter and row range. The sample returns a Toxics Release Inventory facility in California as JSON.
verified.notes: Envirofacts REST API; append /JSON, /XML, or /CSV to choose format. Response echoed the request Origin in access-control-allow-origin. US federal-government data.

skipped.name: IP 2 Country
skipped.reason: Documented endpoint dead: /ip returns Apache 404 (even the site's own example ip2country.info/ip?5.6.7.8), no working keyless JSON GET.

skipped.name: IP Vigilante
skipped.reason: Service dead: ipvigilante.com is now a parked 'domain for sale' page, returns HTML.

skipped.name: OnWater
skipped.reason: Requires an API token: api.onwater.io results endpoint returns the HTML app page, no keyless JSON GET.

skipped.name: Mexico
skipped.reason: GitHub self-host project (sepomex); public hosted mirrors are down (connection timeout / SSL error), no live keyless endpoint.

skipped.name: Rwanda Locations
skipped.reason: RapidAPI-hosted; requires a RapidAPI key and subscription despite the 'none' auth listing.

skipped.name: Census.gov
skipped.reason: Requires an API key: data API returns 'Missing Key' HTML for keyless requests.
